rationale.R1.5: The agent provides a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (incorrect convergence rate and notation collision on ρ).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced.
